speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ki shanti bani rahe, bas isi liye main chup ho gayi hoon. Dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi aur main pati ki seva karte karte toot gayi, par goliyaan dik gayi toh bahu-bete kya sochenge ye darr khata rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se parivaar ki shanti bachane wali majboori ko mirror karna.
text: Tumne apna dard dabaya sirf isliye ki ghar ka mahaul na hile aur rishton mein khinchav na aaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bas yehi sochti hoon ki ghar ki shanti bani rahe. Agar unko pata chal gaya ki main depression ki dawa leti hoon toh kahenge budhape ka natak hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se natak ka label lagne aur izzat tootne ka darr softly reflect karna.
text: Tumhare andar sabse gehra darr yeh hai ki sach pata chala toh tumhari niyat par sawal uth jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Izzat ka bojh bhi hai. Main sochti hoon ghar ki shanti bani rahe toh theek, chahe main andar se kitni bhi khali ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lambe samay se khud ko peeche rakhne ka pattern mirror karna.
text: Kaafi waqt se tum apni zaroorat ko side mein rakhkar bas ghar ko sambhalne mein lagi hui ho.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad relational pressure ko unke shabdon se thoda aur khulwana.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se rishton ko bachane ke liye aansu rokne wali majboori reflect karna.
text: Tum apni sachchai se zyada rishton ki dor ko bachane ko chun rahi ho, isliye aansu bhi andar hi rok leti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha tumne. Main do raaston mein atki hoon, sach bolun toh ghar ka bharosa tootne ka darr, chup rahun toh main hi ghut rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 context mein unke andar ki helpless phasav ko naam dena bina label kiye.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut phansi hui mehsoos kar rahi ho, jaise kisi bhi chune hue raaste mein tumhari hi haar likhi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur kabhi kabhi khud se nazar nahi milti. Main sabka dhyan rakhti hoon par apni baat bolne mein hi sharm aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Unki sharm ko normalise karna aur unki keemat ko parivaar ke role se alag karna.
text: Joint family aur izzat ke mahaul mein aisi baat chhupana bahut logon ka sach hota hai, tum akeli nahi ho. Tumhari keemat sirf is baat se nahi tay hoti ki tum kitna chup reh paati ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tumne yeh bola toh thoda halka laga. Pehli baar lag raha hai ki shayad main buri nahi hoon, bas dari hui hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Elderly caregiving duniya ka ek common pattern dikhakar unki alag-pan ki bhavna kam karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha laga sunke ki yeh sirf mere saath nahi hai. Shayad kisi din dheere se baat ho sakti hai, bina ghar hilaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Health stigma ko vyakti ki kami nahi balki samajik dhanche ki baat ke roop mein reframe karna.
text: Humare yahan dimaagi takleef ko aksar character se jod diya jata hai, isliye log chup rehte hain. Yeh tumhari kami nahi, yeh samaj ka purana tareeka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, samajh aa raha hai. Par mujhe darr hai ki kahin beta soche ki maa usse kuch chhupa rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Unke guilt aur bharosa tootne ke darr ko softly reflect karna.

speaker: Seeker

text: Samaj ki nazar ka darr tumhe har kadam pe rok deta hai...

text: Tumhara yeh sochna ki baat bhi ho aur ghar bhi na hile, bahut samajhdari wali niyat dikhata hai. Tumhari value kam nahi hoti, chahe tum dheere dheere bolna chuno.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, mujhe dheere shuru karna hai. Seedha sab kuch bolna mushkil hai.

speaker: Supporter

text: Agar tum kal se shuru karo, kis waqt beta sabse shaant aur sunne wale mood mein hota hai?

speaker: Supporter

text: Teen chhote raaste hain: (1) 2 minute mein itna bolna: "kabhi kabhi mann bahut bhaari ho jata hai"; (2) dawa ka naam bole bina kehna: "doctor ne mood ki dawa di hai"; (3) pehle sirf yeh kehna ki "mujhe tumhari sunwai chahiye, faisla nahi". Jo tumhe sabse halka lage, wahi chun lo.

text: "Mujhe tumhari sunwai chahiye" wali line theek lag rahi hai. Isse jhagda kam hoga shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen line ko one-step sequence mein practice karwana taaki kal use kar sake.
text: Pehle khane ke baad paani ka glass leke uske paas baitho. Phir dheere se bolo: "Beta, mujhe tumhari sunwai chahiye, bas do minute." Uske baad ek line aur: "Mann bhaari rehta hai, tumse chupana nahi chahti." Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, itna kar sakti hoon. Chhota sa bolna mere liye possible hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chhote khule vaakyoun se family resistance kam hota hai, is systemic point se himmat dena.
text: Aksar parivaar tab kam ghabrata hai jab baat dheere aur seedhi shuru hoti hai, ekdum bada label dekar nahi. Tum jo tareeka chun rahi ho, woh ghar ki shanti ke saath fit baithta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Isse dil halka hai. Lag raha hai bina izzat ko chot diye bhi baat ho sakti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Unke careful courage ko validate karke outcome se alag unki garima ko mazboot karna.
text: Tumne bahut sambhal kar aur izzat rakhte hue raasta nikala hai, yeh chhoti baat nahi. Tumhari garima iss se tay hoti hai ki tum sach ko zimmedari se sambhal rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Ab himmat aa rahi hai ki kal raat woh do line bol paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Conversation ke baad ke liye do micro-options dena taaki overload na ho.
text: Kal baat ke baad do simple cheezein: ya toh 1 minute gehri saans leke paani piyo, ya diary mein sirf ek line likho "aaj maine baat shuru ki". Dono mein se jo asaan lage wohi karna.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closure mein unke chosen small step ko enough batakar agency preserve karna.

text: Sar dard bol kar baat khatam kar deti hoon, par asli baat yeh hai ki main toot rahi hoon. Bahu ne poocha toh bhi sach nahi bol paayi, darr laga ki saas kamzor samjhi jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se unki relational image bachane ki majboori ko mirror karna.
text: Tumne sach se zyada rishton ka santulan bachane ko chunna, isliye apna dard andar rakh liya.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
